name: Rand Paul
subject: Shhh. It's a secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Supporter:

The big spenders and the Big Government apologists in our national media would have you believe our $18.4 TRILLION national debt is "no big deal."

They'd have you believe the recent Obama-Boehner debt deal is a wonderful example of "bipartisanship" and both parties finally "working together" to keep piling on debt on the American people.

_But Supporter, how many Americans would support this scheme if they knew it raided money from Social Security to pay for BOTH parties' short-term spending spikes_?

I'm the ONLY candidate in either party that's willing to call out this nonsense. **[Can I count on your contribution of $20.16 to help me put an end to budgetary hocus-pocus in Washington, D.C.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392073:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)**?

Last week, I introduced a budget point of order to FORCE my colleagues to come up with 60 votes to steal a red cent from Social Security.

That's why my colleague, Senator Mike Lee stated, "I would like to thank Senator Rand Paul for leading the fight to protect Social Security from the thieves in Washington, D.C."

The video, which you can see here, is now creating shockwaves on the Internet.

The decision to raid Social Security to pay for this budget deal shows just how bad things are today.

It's no accident this scheme was RAMMED into law in the wee hours of the morning just days after members of BOTH parties sprung news of this deal on the American people.

The Washington Machine will do anything to keep spending like there's no tomorrow, and keep handing out the taxpayer-funded goodies to their cronies -- including stealing from the tens of millions of Americans who depend on Social Security for their livelihoods.

This is why the American people must take power back from the Washington Machine and believe in freedom once again.

That means lowering taxes to give government less of our money to waste.

It means transitioning to privately-controlled retirement accounts for younger workers -- so the foxes in Washington no longer run the hen house.

It means forcing Congress to read the bills and stop last-minute "deals."

It means cleaning house of ALL career politicians in BOTH parties by imposing term limits on Congress.

Nothing will change in Washington, D.C. unless you and I force it to. But the alternative sends shivers down my spine.

That's why I'm counting on your support.

**[Will you please agree to a generous contribution of $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392073:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)**?

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392074:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392075:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392076:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392077:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392073:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392078:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392079:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31392080:sNhzuQyNX:m:1:879035888:13A45DE04CB281EA809FD906D82535E8:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isNhzuQyNX). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osNhzuQyNX)

name: Cory Gardner
subject: I’m on Marco’s team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44704421:6h9mnvLCN:m:1:1349778030:4C463F60F6075C23CE1E35798834D1DD:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Earlier today, I announced my official endorsement of Marco Rubio for President! Thanks to Marco's support during my first campaign for the Senate last year, I've been able to join him as a new generation of leaders advancing new ideas and solutions for building our country.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44704422:6h9mnvLCN:m:1:1349778030:4C463F60F6075C23CE1E35798834D1DD:r)
---
| Now, I'm glad to return the favor by lending my support to Marco and his campaign. [**Click here to join me in supporting the campaign with a secure, online donation of $10.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44704422:6h9mnvLCN:m:1:1349778030:4C463F60F6075C23CE1E35798834D1DD:r) In my home state of Colorado, we know the importance of electing new leadership to fight for and strengthen the American Dream. We'll have the opportunity to do that again in 2016 when we get to vote for Marco to be our next president. When Marco is our president, the votes I'm taking in the Senate will be on legislation that finally lands on the desk of a president who will sign bills into law, rather than vetoing them or getting Harry Reid to grind the Senate to a halt. If you're ready to send a new president to Washington who will represent the next generation of leadership, **[please click here to chip in $10 to let Marco know you're with him.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44704422:6h9mnvLCN:m:1:1349778030:4C463F60F6075C23CE1E35798834D1DD:r)** Sincerely, Cory GardnerU.S. SenatorColorado
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44704422:6h9mnvLCN:m:1:1349778030:4C463F60F6075C23CE1E35798834D1DD:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Chris Shores, Ted Cruz for Virginia
subject: Tomorrow: Help Get Ted Cruz on the Ballot!
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Tomorrow, Tuesday, November 3rd is Election Day in the
Commonwealth. All 140 members of the State Legislature and local
office holders will be on the ballot. This will be a great
opportunity to collect signatures at your local polling location
for our effort to secure Senator Ted Cruz a spot on the Virginia
ballot for the March 1st Republican Presidential Primary.

We have already
collected thousands of signatures, but are still short of our
goal. We need your help tomorrow.

Please notify us via
email at Virginia@tedcruz.org if you'll commit to working your
local precinct and obtaining petition signatures on behalf of the
Ted Cruz for President Campaign.

Click here to
download and print the petition.

The petition must
be printed front and back on one sheet of paper.
Prepare a
separate petition page for each locality.
The district
number should be entered on each petition page.
Before returning
your completed petition you must get it notarized.

Return your notarized
petition to the address below by Monday Nov. 23rd:

Ted Cruz for Virginia
308B South Main
Street
Box 509
Farmville, VA 23901

Thank you for being a
Courageous Conservative and thanks for all that you are doing on
behalf of this effort!

For Liberty,

Chris Shores
Ted Cruz for Virginia

P.S. We don't have
much time to get Ted on the ballot in Virginia and your help is
critical. Download the form today to ensure Ted is on the ballot
in Virginia.

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system October 8, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ismQEVQy6N

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osmQEVQy6N

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-30144110874-echo3-F358C98E287D7991CB5646135774CCBE@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Official Carson Campaign
subject: NEW: The Ben Carson Mobile App
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|

Peter,

We've just released the official Ben Carson mobile app, and it's available for both Apple and Android users.

The app will make it easy for supporters like you to find and comment on official social media feeds and campaign updates in one easy location.

You can also participate in trivia challenges, earn rewards, discuss issues with other supporters, share photos, purchase official merchandise, check out campaign updates and much more.

Whether you're an Apple or an Android user, [you can download the free Ben Carson app here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31399375:s0hTiQyNw:m:1:876315805:3409C4A16B64C6BC6B8E3A6AE09ECC3B:r).

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Upcoming deadline
body:
Friend,

I've said it time and again, I'm in this to win. That means competing in every state across the country, far beyond the February caucuses and primaries.

The first step is getting my name on the ballot in all 50 states. It's not as easy as it sounds -- it's a lengthy and costly process, and I can't do it without your support.

[**Today, the filing period opens in Arkansas, and it costs $25,000 just to get my name on the ballot. Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $1 right now to help get my name on the ballot?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pjdtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgqmvhl_wsnggzjf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We only have one week to raise the money and get on the ballot. If we fall even $1 short of the $25,000 we need to raise, voters won't see my name on the ballot when they head to the polls.

This campaign has the organization and grassroots support to win the nomination, but unless we can raise the money necessary to get on the ballot in Arkansas and every other state, our efforts will fall short.

[**Can you chip in $1 or whatever you can afford to help get me on the Arkansas ballot before Monday, November 9?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cpjrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsdcmtj_wsnggzjf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Friend, all of our efforts mean nothing if my name is missing from the ballot on Election Day.

**Please contribute $50, $25, $5 or even $1 right now so we can raise the $25,000 we need to secure my name on the ballot in Arkansas:[Jeb2016.com/Ballot-Access/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/yqgryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwlkvsc_wsnggzjf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rngfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsrglcl_wsnggzjf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5174&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

We only have one week to raise the money and get on the ballot. If we fall even $1 short of the $25,000 we need to raise, voters won't see my name on the ballot when they head to the polls. This campaign has the organization and grassroots support to win the nomination, but unless we can raise the money necessary to get on the ballot in Arkansas and every other state, our efforts will fall short. Friend, all of our efforts mean nothing if my name is missing from the ballot on Election Day. Please contribute $50, $25, $5 or even $1 right now so we can raise the $25,000 we need to secure my name on the ballot in Arkansas: Thank you, Jeb Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc. Jeb 2016, Inc. name: Claire Sandberg, Bernie 2016
subject: They said it couldn't be done
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
Help Bernie take another big step toward victory today:
**[Sign up to hand out flyers, hold a debate watch party, register voters, or do something else during our"Week of Action" from November 8 to 15th!](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa36/3723565613/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/hold-an-event?source=em151101-cont-2")**
When Bernie announced he was running for president and called for a political revolution in this country, the political media laughed him off -- they said his radical ideas would never attract much support.
Then, when tens of thousands of people began turning out to hear Bernie talk about taking on the billionaire class, the insiders said we would never get organized.
When over 100,000 people came together this summer to start organizing for Bernie in their communities, the insiders said we would never raise enough money to be competitive.
And finally, when Bernie announced that over 650,000 people had made over 1.3 million contributions to our campaign, the insiders were forced to acknowledge that this movement is real -- and it isn't going away.
Again and again, this campaign has defied the conventional wisdom -- because of you. And we're just getting started.
From November 9th through November 15th, we're holding a week of action to organize for the political revolution. **[Bring the revolution to your community by signing up to host an event for the week of action.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa36/3723565613/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/hold-an-event?source=em151101-cont-2")**
Since our organizing kickoff in July, thousands of volunteers have been working hard every single week to spread the word about Bernie, get Bernie on the ballot in their states, register voters, and build this movement among their neighbors. The dedication and creativity of these volunteers has been nothing short of incredible.
**To win this election and create a real political revolution, we need many more people to get engaged as leaders -- including you.** Let us be frank: the insiders are right that the odds have always been stacked against us in this campaign. We don't have the political establishment on our side. And we know that, even with our record-breaking number of small donors, we will ultimately be outspent.
**But we will not be out-organized.** In the end, our ability to win this primary and this election will come down to how many people we engage as genuine leaders in this movement.
Will you step up to be a leader in this movement?
* **[Yes, I will step up to bring the political revolution to my community by hosting an event for the week of action November 9th - November 15th.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa36/3723565613/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/hold-an-event?source=em151101-cont-2")**
* [**I can 't host an event, but I can chip in $3 to support this volunteer-driven movement.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa37/3723565613/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em151101-cont-2")

There are many types of events you can host during the week of action: you can host a watch party for the second Democratic debate on Saturday November 14th, an outreach event to flyer and sign up volunteers for Bernie, a voter registration drive, an art-making party or other creative event, and much more. Once you sign up as an event host, we'll be in touch with tools, resources, and plenty of support to get you going.
**[The most important thing is to sign-up to host an event today.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa36/3723565613/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/hold-an-event?source=em151101-cont-2")**
Together, we're going to prove the insiders wrong once again.
It's an honor to be with you in this movement,
Claire Sandberg
Digital Organizing Director
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa34/3723565613/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151101-cont-2")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa35/3723565613/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa32/3723565613/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa33/3723565613/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb24ff/43f17890/532d2300/621efa30/3723565613/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Dear Bernie Supporter, Help Bernie take another big step toward victory today: "" When Bernie announced he was running for president and called for a political revolution in this country, the political media laughed him off -- they said his radical ideas would never attract much support. Then, when tens of thousands of people began turning out to hear Bernie talk about taking on the billionaire class, the insiders said we would never get organized. When over 100,000 people came together this summer to start organizing for Bernie in their communities, the insiders said we would never raise enough money to be competitive. And finally, when Bernie announced that over 650,000 people had made over 1.3 million contributions to our campaign, the insiders were forced to acknowledge that this movement is real -- and it isn't going away. Again and again, this campaign has defied the conventional wisdom -- because of you. And we're just getting started. From November 9th through November 15th, we're holding a week of action to organize for the political revolution. "" Since our organizing kickoff in July, thousands of volunteers have been working hard every single week to spread the word about Bernie, get Bernie on the ballot in their states, register voters, and build this movement among their neighbors. The dedication and creativity of these volunteers has been nothing short of incredible. To win this election and create a real political revolution, we need many more people to get engaged as leaders -- including you. Let us be frank: the insiders are right that the odds have always been stacked against us in this campaign. We don't have the political establishment on our side. And we know that, even with our record-breaking number of small donors, we will ultimately be outspent. But we will not be out-organized. In the end, our ability to win this primary and this election will come down to how many people we engage as genuine leaders in this movement. Will you step up to be a leader in this movement? "" "" There are many types of events you can host during the week of action: you can host a watch party for the second Democratic debate on Saturday November 14th, an outreach event to flyer and sign up volunteers for Bernie, a voter registration drive, an art-making party or other creative event, and much more. Once you sign up as an event host, we'll be in touch with tools, resources, and plenty of support to get you going. "" Together, we're going to prove the insiders wrong once again. It's an honor to be with you in this movement, Claire Sandberg Digital Organizing Director Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Team Katie
subject: Reminder: Your plan to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Tomorrow is Election Day, Friend.

As a reminder, here's what you said your plan is:

| _Pending_
---
**[If your plan has changed, click here to update it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5597531336714747904/5361556247105503232?ms=e20151102u&refcode=20151102&amount=15)**
Polls are open from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m tomorrow. **[To look up your polling place, click here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5597531336714747904/5433613841143431168)**

We're counting on your help to remind your friends and family to vote too! **Take ten seconds to share this graphic and remind your friends to vote tomorrow:**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5597531336714747904/5505671435181359104?type=3&theater)
---

Your vote is too important to not be cast. Meaningful change starts on the local level, so if we want to see progress on the national stage, we must first make an impact here in Pennsylvania and in our communities, and the best way to do that is by casting a ballot.

Thank you for your commitment,

Team Katie
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5597531336714747904/5289498653067575296).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
